use_cases: Virtual keyboard interface for web applications requiring text input
Keyboard shortcut reference or cheat sheet display
Typing practice or educational software interfaces
Accessibility tools for users who need on-screen keyboards
Demo or mockup of keyboard hardware for product showcases
ai_summary: A realistic virtual keyboard component with interactive key press animations featuring hover lift effects and active state depression. Built with flat minimalist design using gray tones, subtle shadows, and rounded corners for a clean, functional aesthetic suitable for web applications requiring on-screen keyboard interfaces or keyboard shortcut visualizations.
